name: ngx-translatorex
description: Angular ngx-translate toolkit: one-shortcut extraction, multi-language sync, missing-key diagnostics, go-to-definition, key rename/delete, and hard-coded string detection.

commands.title: ngx-translatorex: Set Main i18n json file
ngx-translatorex: Set Path to i18n folder
ngx-translatorex: Add new translation
commands.enablement: editorLangId == typescript && editorHasSelection || editorLangId == html && editorHasSelection

commands.title: ngx-translatorex: Sort Main i18n json file
ngx-translatorex: Rename i18n key across all languages
ngx-translatorex: Delete i18n key across all languages
ngx-translatorex: Scan workspace for hard-coded strings

ngx-translatorex.mode.description: Mode: can be key or scope

ngx-translatorex.placeholder.description: Placeholder written into secondary language files for a new key until it is translated. Also used to flag untranslated keys in the translation report.

ngx-translatorex.diagnostics.description: Report keys used with the translate pipe (HTML) or TranslateService (TypeScript) that are missing from the i18n files as warnings.

ngx-translatorex.syncLanguages.description: When adding a new key, also write a placeholder into every other language file so the key exists in all languages.

ngx-translatorex.detectHardcodedStrings.description: Experimental: flag hard-coded (untranslated) user-facing strings in HTML templates as hints, with quick fixes to extract or ignore them. Opt-in.

ngx-translatorex.hardcodedStringsMinLeng.description: Minimum length of a hard-coded string to flag. Shorter strings are ignored.

ngx-translatorex.hardcodedStringsIgnore.description: Strings to never flag as hard-coded. Supports '*' wildcards (e.g. 'OK', '© *').

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
scripts.test:unit: npm run clean && npm run compile && mocha "out/test/unit/**/*.test.js"
scripts.test:e2e: npm run clean && npm run compile && node ./out/test/runTest.js
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
